pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page for the church outreach initiative with overview content, featured items, and quick access to key actions (Serve, Events, Give, Get Help, Care & Prayer, Contact, About).
primary_functions: Provide global navigation to Serve, Events, Give, Get Help, Care & Prayer, About, and Contact sections
Highlight featured volunteer opportunities, outreach events, and giving needs
Offer quick links to get help, submit prayer requests, and subscribe to email devotionals

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click main navigation link 'Volunteer Opportunities' under Serve section in header
Click main navigation link 'Events' in header
Click homepage CTA 'See all outreach & service events'
Click homepage CTA 'Upcoming neighborhood cleanups'
Click main navigation link 'Give' or any featured giving CTA
Click quick action card 'Get food help' or 'Food Resources'
Click quick action card 'Submit a prayer request'
Click quick action card 'Email devotionals' or footer link 'Email devotionals'
Click header link 'My outreach plan'
Click header or footer link 'Contact us'
Click header or footer link 'About'
Click a featured volunteer opportunity card
Click a featured event card
Click a featured fund 'Give now' button

access_methods.description: Clicking the site logo in the header returns to Home
Users can land directly on index.html from external search or links

pages.name: Volunteer Opportunities
pages.description: Filterable listing of all volunteer opportunities, including food pantry shifts and other serving roles, with tools to narrow by category, location, date, and time.
primary_functions: List volunteer opportunities with key details such as title, category, location, date, and time
Allow filtering by category (e.g., food pantry), ZIP code and radius, date range, time of day, and days of week
Allow sorting results (e.g., by date - soonest first)
Link to detailed volunteer opportunity pages for viewing full information and registering for shifts

incoming_params.description: Optional VolunteerOpportunity.category key to pre-filter the list (e.g., 'food_pantry').
Optional ZIP code to pre-fill the location filter.
Optional search radius in miles to pre-fill the location filter.
Optional ISO date string to pre-set the start of the date range filter.
Optional ISO date string to pre-set the end of the date range filter.
Optional time-of-day key (e.g., 'evening') to pre-select in filters.
Optional comma-separated list of day-of-week keys to pre-select (e.g., 'monday,tuesday').
Optional sort key, e.g., 'date_soonest'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a volunteer opportunity card or 'View details' link in the results list

access_methods.description: Calls-to-action from Home or About pages linking into pre-filtered Serve views

pages.name: Volunteer Opportunity Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single volunteer opportunity with description, requirements, location, and available shifts for registration.
primary_functions: Display full description, requirements, location, and contact information for the volunteer opportunity
Show a list of upcoming shift dates and times for this opportunity
Allow users to select a specific shift and register by entering name, email, and phone
Confirm successful shift registration with an on-page success message

incoming_params.description: ID of the VolunteerOpportunity to display.
Optional ISO date string to bound the earliest shift shown.
Optional ISO date string to bound the latest shift shown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to volunteer opportunities' link
Click header link 'My outreach plan' after registering for a shift

access_methods.description: Accessed via volunteerOpportunityId parameter from the listing or featured opportunity tiles

pages.name: Events
pages.description: Central listing of all church events, classes, workshops, outreach events, and neighborhood cleanups with robust filters.
primary_functions: List events with titles, dates, times, campuses/locations, cost, and format
Allow filtering by category (e.g., workshops_classes, outreach_service, neighborhood_cleanups), cost (including free only), format (in-person/online), and campus
Provide additional filters such as ZIP code and radius (for location-based events), date range, day of week, time of day, and activity level (for neighborhood cleanups)
Allow sorting results by options such as date - soonest first
Link to event detail pages for registration, RSVP, and outreach planning

incoming_params.description: Optional Event.category key to pre-filter results, e.g., 'workshops_classes', 'outreach_service', or 'neighborhood_cleanups'.
Optional campus ID to pre-select in the campus filter.
Optional ZIP code used to pre-populate the location filter.
Optional radius in miles for location-based filtering.
Optional ISO date string defining the start of the date range filter.
Optional ISO date string defining the end of the date range filter.
Optional day-of-week key to pre-select, e.g., 'saturday'.
Optional time-of-day key to pre-select, e.g., 'morning' or 'evening'.
Optional key for activity level, especially for neighborhood cleanups.
If true, pre-filters to events that can be added to an outreach plan.
Optional sort key, e.g., 'date_soonest'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an event card or 'View details' link in the results list

access_methods.description: Header link 'Neighborhood cleanups' points to events.html?categoryId=neighborhood_cleanups, pre-filtering the listing
CTAs from Home and About pages to pre-filtered event lists

pages.name: Event Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a single event, such as workshops, outreach events, and neighborhood cleanups, with registration/RSVP and outreach plan actions.
primary_functions: Display full event information including title, description, date and time, campus/location, cost, format, and any requirements
Provide a registration or RSVP form allowing users to enter name, email, and number of attendees/guests and complete registration
Offer an 'Add to my outreach plan' action for applicable outreach and service events
Confirm event registration or RSVP submission with an on-page success message

incoming_params.description: ID of the Event to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to events' link
Click 'View my outreach plan' after adding an event to the plan

access_methods.description: Accessed via eventId parameter from Events listing, Home featured events, or Outreach Plan items

pages.name: Give
pages.description: Online giving page to make one-time or recurring donations, including split gifts across multiple funds, with secure payment entry.
primary_functions: Allow selection of gift frequency such as one-time or recurring
Support multi-fund giving with options like custom allocation or split by fund and multiple fund rows (e.g., Youth Outreach, Local Food Pantry)
Collect donor information including name, email, and mailing address
Collect payment details such as credit/debit card number, expiration date, CVV, and billing ZIP/postal code
Submit donations and display confirmation of successful giving

incoming_params.description: Optional Fund.id to pre-select as the first allocation row.
Optional amount to pre-fill as a suggested gift for the selected fund.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Return to home' after successful donation confirmation

access_methods.description: CTAs from Home or About pages linking users directly into Give

pages.name: Food Resources
pages.description: Directory of food-related assistance resources such as food pantries and meal programs, searchable by day, time, and services offered.
primary_functions: List food resources with key information such as name, location, hours, and tags (e.g., fresh produce)
Allow filtering by category (e.g., food pantry), day open, time of day (including afternoon options), and services offered/tags
Allow users to select an individual food resource to view more detailed information
Link to food pantry detail pages for contact information and directions

incoming_params.description: Optional FoodResource.category key to pre-filter the listing, e.g., 'food_pantry'.
Optional day-of-week key to pre-select (e.g., 'wednesday').
Optional time-of-day key for filtering, e.g., 'afternoon_after_1500'.
Optional comma-separated list of service tag keys to pre-select, e.g., 'fresh_produce'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a food resource listing row or 'View details' link

access_methods.description: Quick action from Home like 'Get food help'

pages.name: Food Pantry Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a specific food pantry or similar food resource, including hours, services, and easily copied contact info.
primary_functions: Display full details including address, map or directions link, hours by day, phone number, and services offered (such as fresh produce)
Present contact information in a format that can be easily highlighted and copied by the user
Provide any special instructions or eligibility notes for visitors

incoming_params.description: ID of the FoodResource to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to food resources' link
Click 'Ask a question about this pantry' button (optional shortcut; user can still adjust subject)

access_methods.description: Accessed via foodResourceId parameter from the Food Resources listing

pages.name: Prayer Request
pages.description: Form for submitting personal or family-related prayer requests to the church, with category, privacy, and focus date settings.
primary_functions: Allow users to choose a prayer category (e.g., Family & Relationships)
Offer privacy options such as sharing only with the pastoral team
Provide a date picker to select a prayer focus date (e.g., the next upcoming Sunday)
Collect the prayer message and the requesters name and email address
Submit the prayer request and display a confirmation message

incoming_params.description: Optional PrayerRequest.category key to pre-select, e.g., 'family_relationships'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Return to home' after prayer request confirmation

access_methods.description: Quick action from Home 'Submit a prayer request'

pages.name: My Outreach Plan
pages.description: Personal planning page showing events the user has added to their outreach plan, summarizing upcoming commitments across campuses.
primary_functions: Display a list of events the user has added to their outreach plan with dates, times, and campuses
Allow users to review their planned outreach activities across different campuses
Provide options to remove events from the plan or adjust simple notes about participation
Help users prepare for involvement by summarizing upcoming outreach commitments

incoming_params.description: Optional event ID recently added to the plan to highlight in the list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an event title in the outreach plan list

access_methods.description: Post-registration CTAs on event detail pages linking into the plan

pages.name: Contact Us
pages.description: General contact page with a form for inquiries, including questions about food pantries, and alternative contact details.
primary_functions: Provide a subject dropdown with options such as 'Question about food pantry'
Allow users to enter a message, including pasted information such as a phone number, along with their name and email
Submit contact messages to the church and show an on-page confirmation
Present alternative contact information (e.g., phone or mailing address) if needed

incoming_params.description: Optional ContactMessage.subject key (e.g., 'question_about_food_pantry') to pre-select in the subject dropdown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Return to home' after contact form confirmation

access_methods.description: Links from resource detail pages like Food Pantry Detail to contact the church

pages.name: Devotional Sign-up
pages.description: Subscription page for email devotionals targeted by age group, frequency, and topic, including accessibility-friendly options.
primary_functions: Allow users to choose email frequency (e.g., weekly)
Provide an age group selector (e.g., 1835) to tailor content
Offer topic checkboxes such as community service and spiritual growth, allowing users to select specific interests
Collect subscriber name and email address
Offer a preference option for text-only emails or similar formatting choices
Submit devotional subscription preferences and confirm successful sign-up

incoming_params.description: Optional devotional email_frequency key to pre-select, e.g., 'weekly'.
Optional age_group key to pre-select (e.g., 'age_18_35').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to home' after subscription confirmation

access_methods.description: Quick action from Home footer or 'Stay connected' section

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information about the church, its outreach initiative, and campus locations, with CTAs into key outreach programs.
primary_functions: Describe the mission, vision, and core outreach values of the church
Highlight key outreach programs such as food pantries, neighborhood cleanups, and workshops
Provide basic information about campuses or locations and how to get involved

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click CTA under 'Food pantries' outreach program
Click CTA under 'Neighborhood cleanups' outreach program
Click CTA under 'Workshops & classes' outreach program
Click CTA 'Support our outreach work' in About page content

access_methods.description: Direct links from search engines or external sites to About page

header_links.description: Homepage with overview and featured outreach opportunities
Serve > Volunteer opportunities listing with filters and shift sign-up
Serve > Neighborhood cleanup events filtered list
All events including workshops, outreach events, and classes
Get Help > Food pantry and meal resources directory
Care & Prayer > Submit a prayer request form
View and manage the users saved outreach events
General contact form and communication options
About the church and outreach initiative

footer_links.description: About us and our outreach mission
Browse and sign up for volunteer opportunities
View all upcoming events and workshops
Find food pantries and food assistance resources
Submit a prayer request to the pastoral team
Sign up for age-specific email devotionals
